mano_cua.result_summary: the-graph编辑器正常渲染了默认流程图（多个节点+连线），但无法通过浏览器UI创建缺少组件信息的节点。DevTools Console中appState和TheGraph均为undefined（模块作用域未暴露全局），loadGraph二次调用会因#loading元素已移除而报错。80步未能完成测试目标。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Both appState and TheGraph are undefined in global scope. The graph editor uses module-scoped variables not exposed globally. loadGraph function throws error on second call because #loading element already removed from DOM. Unable to programmatically load graph with missing component info through browser console.
